metadata.description: Julien's personal Claude Code skill collection — coaching, slides, design, product validation, and indie founder tools.

plugins.name: nvc-coach
plugins.description: Non-Violent Communication coach. Describe a situation, reformulate a message with empathy, or reflect on a past interaction. Based on Marshall Rosenberg's NVC framework.

plugins.name: impactful-slides
plugins.description: McKinsey-style slide coach. Share a deck or slide titles to get a structured review: titles-only test, 7 principles, mental model assessment, bridge analysis, and priority rewrites.

plugins.name: logo-designer
plugins.description: Create professional SVG logos from descriptions and design specifications. Generates multiple logo variations with different layouts, styles, and concepts.

plugins.name: validate-app-idea
plugins.description: Evaluate whether an app idea is worth building using the painkiller/vitamin/candy framework and 3 validation questions.

plugins.name: slc-scope
plugins.description: Scope an MVP using the SLC (Simple, Lovable, Complete) framework — ship the smallest version that delivers real value in a weekend.

plugins.name: landing-page-builder
plugins.description: Build or review a high-conversion landing page for an app using the three pillars: copywriting, design, and social proof.

plugins.name: app-launch-marketing
plugins.description: Create a realistic marketing plan for an app launch — organic Reddit, Product Hunt, social content strategy, and paid ads guidance.

plugins.name: video-to-skills
plugins.description: Analyze a video transcript and create Claude Code skill files from the teachable frameworks and actionable advice it contains.
